criteria.claim: Factory constructs reusable clinical instruments for the pneumonia discharge use case.
evidence: environmental_medication_access_rules
frailty_index_calculator
secondary_infection_risk_classifier

criteria.claim: Every generated instrument declares validation checks and limitations before use.

evidence.name: frailty_index_calculator
limitations: Requires local calibration before real use

evidence.name: secondary_infection_risk_classifier
limitations: No replacement for infectious disease review

evidence.name: environmental_medication_access_rules
validation_checks: route high access risk to support planning
limitations: Requires vetted SDOH data and fairness review

criteria.claim: Plan decomposes the discharge decision into auditable clinical, operational, and support checks.
evidence: Confirm afebrile duration and current vital stability.
Evaluate WBC/procalcitonin trajectory and culture-pending status.
Estimate frailty from mobility, falls, age, nutrition, and prior utilization.
Assess medication access, adherence concern, pharmacy distance, and support availability.
Generate what-if scenarios for discharge timing and support interventions.
Prepare structured human handoff with red flags and reasoning trace.
Route updated mobility assessment before discharge sign-off.
Route care-management review for home support gap.

criteria.claim: Analyze fuses deterministic rules and bounded risk scores into explainable patient-level findings.

evidence.interpretation: Mobility decline is a discharge support signal.
Clinical stability should be reviewed before discharge.

criteria.claim: Recursive validation catches borderline or high-risk signals before final handoff.
evidence: frailty_index high: force clinician_review_required.
Infection risk borderline/high with pending cultures: re-evaluate before final handoff.
environmental_medication_access_risk high: force clinician_review_required.
Access risk elevated: verify medication-in-hand or delivery before discharge.

criteria.claim: Simulate evaluates discharge timing and support alternatives with explicit operational triggers.

evidence.name: discharge_today_no_added_support
evidence.assumption: Patient leaves today with standard instructions only.
evidence.empathy_prompt: Create a respectful discharge-day image: an older adult at home after pneumonia, medications on a kitchen table, visible fatigue, and a phone reminder for follow-up. No fear tactics, no identifiable patient likeness, no medical gore.
evidence.operational_trigger: Require clinician review if any individual risk band is high.

evidence.name: delay_24h_reassess
evidence.assumption: Discharge is delayed 24 hours for mobility reassessment, lab trend review, and oral antibiotic confirmation.
evidence.empathy_prompt: Create a calm hospital-room planning image: clinician and patient reviewing a discharge checklist, with mobility support and medication plan visible.
evidence.operational_trigger: Re-run Analyze after updated vitals, labs, and mobility assessment.

evidence.name: discharge_with_medication_and_home_support
evidence.assumption: Patient leaves with medication delivery confirmation, teach-back, and home health or caregiver support.
evidence.empathy_prompt: Create an optimistic home-transition image: medication delivery bag, caregiver checklist, and patient resting safely with clear follow-up instructions.
evidence.operational_trigger: Route to care management for access support and post-discharge follow-up.

criteria.claim: What-if image prompts drive discharge empathy without becoming clinical evidence.

prompts: Create a respectful discharge-day image: an older adult at home after pneumonia, medications on a kitchen table, visible fatigue, and a phone reminder for follow-up. No fear tactics, no identifiable patient likeness, no medical gore.
Create a calm hospital-room planning image: clinician and patient reviewing a discharge checklist, with mobility support and medication plan visible.
Create an optimistic home-transition image: medication delivery bag, caregiver checklist, and patient resting safely with clear follow-up instructions.

criteria.claim: Output produces a decision-ready human handoff with red flags, actions, and mandatory clinician review.

evidence.summary: Synthetic runtime flags this case for clinician review before discharge.
actions_to_consider: Clinician reviews reasoning trace and confirms disposition.
Medication access is verified before discharge.
Teach-back and follow-up plan are documented.
Mobility and home support plan reviewed with care management.
Medication delivery or pharmacy access support considered.
red_flags: Afebrile duration below 48 hours in demo criteria.
evidence.clinician_note: Demo only: treating clinician must validate all findings against the real chart and local policy.

criteria.claim: The run persists institutional memory for pulmonary service-line reuse, not just a one-off answer.

evidence.note: Synthetic demo event. Do not store PHI.

criteria.claim: The use case preserves synthetic-only safety boundaries and avoids autonomous clinical orders.

frailty_index_calculator: Requires local calibration before real use
secondary_infection_risk_classifier: No replacement for infectious disease review
environmental_medication_access_rules: Requires vetted SDOH data and fairness review

evidence.clinician_note: Demo only: treating clinician must validate all findings against the real chart and local policy.
evidence.memory_note: Synthetic demo event. Do not store PHI.

criteria.claim: Runtime executes the governed HOMER-1 state order before persistence.

analyze
simulate

instruments.name: frailty_index_calculator
instruments.purpose: Estimate discharge fragility from mobility, nutrition, age, and recent utilization.
limitations: Requires local calibration before real use

instruments.name: secondary_infection_risk_classifier
instruments.purpose: Flag unresolved infection concern from WBC trajectory, procalcitonin trend, cultures, and vitals.
limitations: No replacement for infectious disease review

instruments.name: environmental_medication_access_rules
instruments.purpose: Represent non-clinical discharge risks that drive avoidable readmission.
validation_checks: route high access risk to support planning
limitations: Requires vetted SDOH data and fairness review

Assess medication access, adherence concern, pharmacy distance, and support availability.
Generate what-if scenarios for discharge timing and support interventions.
Prepare structured human handoff with red flags and reasoning trace.
Route updated mobility assessment before discharge sign-off.
Route care-management review for home support gap.
